div.div: We use cookies to keep your bag, remember preferences, and improve the store. Learn more.

t.t-value: bestsellers and len(bestsellers) > 1 and bestsellers[1] or False
bestsellers and len(bestsellers) > 2 and bestsellers[2] or False
ProductT.search(pub + img_filter + [('name','ilike','Lattafa')], limit=3) or ProductT.search(pub + img_filter, limit=3)

t.t-if: first_word and first_word not in brand_set

div.p: Curated Arabian fragrances at live-auction prices.

a.span: ▶ Set a reminder & never miss a drop →

t.t-value: 'Check back soon — fresh drops every week.'
'What are you in the mood for?'

div.p: The house behind Khamrah, Asad and Yara — bold, affordable Arabian perfumery that punches far above its price.

section.p: “We hunt down the bottles worth wearing — and price them so you can actually own them.”

div.p: Answer 4 quick questions and we'll match you to your next scent.

t.t-foreach: [('Khamrah is unreal for the price — compliments every single time.', 'Ayesha K.'), ('Won Hawas on a live for $14. 100% authentic, shipped in two days.', 'Marcus T.'), ('Yara smells expensive and lasts all day. Obsessed.', 'Dana R.')]

div.p: From brands & authorized distributors — never testers or fakes.
Every bottle checks out, or we refund you in full.
Ships within 2 business days, free over $75.
Get a heads-up before every live auction and new arrival.
Bids open at $1. Win authentic bottles for a fraction of retail — shipped straight to your door.
Quick answers — tap any section to expand.
Unopened items can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund of the item price.
Opened/used fragrances are non-returnable for hygiene reasons.
Live auction wins are final sale — they're sold at a steep discount and we can't restock them.
To start a return, email hello@ynfdeals.com with your order number.
Free shipping on orders over $75 (US only). Otherwise $6.95 flat.
Orders ship within 2 business days from our New Jersey warehouse via USPS or UPS Ground with tracking.
Live-auction wins ship together at the end of each show week — typically Mon/Tue after the prior Sunday's auction.
Every bottle is sourced direct from the brand or an authorized distributor. We never sell testers or unboxed product as new.
Each shipment is batch-code verified. If you ever doubt a bottle, send a photo of the batch code to hello@ynfdeals.com and we'll check it against the manufacturer's records — or refund you in full.
We use cookies to keep your shopping bag, remember preferences, and improve the store. We do not sell your data.
Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Analytics cookies are optional — you can decline them in the consent banner.
For account/order data we follow standard PCI-DSS handling via our payment processor. Email hello@ynfdeals.com for a copy or deletion of your data.
By placing an order you agree that all listings, prices, and stock are subject to change without notice and that we may cancel any order at any time prior to shipment.
Live-auction wins are governed by the platform rules on TikTok at the time of the auction.
Promotional discounts cannot be combined with auction pricing.
Email — hello@ynfdeals.com
Live shows — @ynfdeals on TikTok
Mailing — YNF Deals, New Jersey, USA
Authentic Arabian & niche fragrances at live-auction prices. Catch us live on TikTok, or shop the catalog anytime.
